# cmccloudv2_mongo_database (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `collections` (Set of String) Set of collections that you want to create on this mongo database
- `instance_id` (String) Mongo instance id
- `name` (String) Mongo database name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
